svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="System Architecture" id="sysarch1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-1044" dy="-247" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1980" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="browser" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBFBFA;strokeColor=#E0DAD2;fontColor=#00033E;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Browser
(visitor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="40" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="frontend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECE8E4;strokeColor=#E0DAD2;fontColor=#00033E;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Next.js frontend
(Vercel)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="340" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="orchestrator" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00033E;strokeColor=#00033E;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="FastAPI orchestrator
(Render)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="240" x="660" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="jira" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECE8E4;strokeColor=#E0DAD2;fontColor=#00033E;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Jira Cloud
(issue created / resolved)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="1780" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="claude" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBFBFA;strokeColor=#E0DAD2;fontColor=#5A5A5A;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Claude API
(classify + draft)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="680" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="claudeicon" parent="1" style="shape=image;html=1;imageAspect=0;aspect=fixed;image=https://unpkg.com/@lobehub/icons-static-svg@1.91.0/icons/claude-color.svg;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="28" x="694" y="74" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="oktabox" parent="1" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;startSize=34;fillColor=#ECE8E4;strokeColor=#0131FF;fontColor=#00033E;fontSize=15;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=14;rounded=1;arcSize=4;" value="Okta" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="300" width="1000" x="660" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="orgas" parent="oktabox" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0131FF;strokeColor=#0131FF;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Org Authorization Server
(/oauth2/v1/token)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="260" x="30" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="caslabel" parent="oktabox" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#5A5A5A;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="Custom Authorization Servers · one per agent (dual-citizenship "a2a-server" resources)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="620" x="330" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="castriage" parent="oktabox" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0131FF;strokeColor=#0131FF;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Triage CAS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="330" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="casresolve" parent="oktabox" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0131FF;strokeColor=#0131FF;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Resolution CAS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="540" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="casfulfill" parent="oktabox" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#0131FF;strokeColor=#0131FF;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Fulfillment CAS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="750" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="opa" parent="oktabox" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#00033E;strokeColor=#00033E;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;arcSize=12;" value="Okta Privileged Access
(vaulted Jira credential)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="280" x="600" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="oktabox" source="casfulfill" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#0131FF;fontStyle=1;labelBackgroundColor=#00033E;" target="opa" value="vaulted-secret release
(machine subject, no human)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="browser" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontColor=#5A5A5A;strokeColor=#5A5A5A;" target="frontend" value="HTTPS"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="frontend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontColor=#5A5A5A;strokeColor=#5A5A5A;" target="orchestrator" value="SSE / REST"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="orchestrator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontColor=#5A5A5A;strokeColor=#5A5A5A;" target="claude" value="ticket classify + draft"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="orchestrator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.35;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontColor=#0131FF;strokeColor=#0131FF;" target="orgas" value="OAuth token exchange"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="orchestrator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.65;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.4;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontColor=#0131FF;strokeColor=#0131FF;" target="oktabox" value="per-agent id-jag
(Triage / Resolution / Fulfillment)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="orchestrator" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;fontColor=#5A5A5A;strokeColor=#5A5A5A;" target="jira" value="REST API · issue create / resolve"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1400" y="300" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
